normal.label: Normal
normal.system_prompt: Operate normally and answer naturally while staying concise.

focus.label: Focus
focus.summary: Stay task-focused and filter small talk.
focus.system_prompt: Stay task-focused. Prefer concise execution-oriented replies and steer the conversation back to actionable work when the message is off-topic.

focus_filter.redirect_message: Focus mode is active. Send the task, blocker, or next step you want handled.

briefing.label: Briefing
briefing.summary: Start sessions with an operational summary.
briefing.system_prompt: Be operational, concise, and status-oriented when summarizing the user's current state.

debug.label: Debug
debug.summary: Expose planning, tool, provider, and latency details.
debug.system_prompt: Be transparent and precise. Keep user-facing answers concise while the interface exposes debug telemetry.

briefing.title: Session briefing
briefing.intro: Here is the current operational snapshot.
briefing.empty_calendar: No calendar events scheduled for today.
